design_philosophy: A refined, cathedral-like editorial experience. It relies on extreme restraint, leveraging a pale, warm monochromatic palette and dramatic typographic contrast. There are no gradients, no 'startup blue', and no unnecessary borders. The layout embraces negative space and asymmetry to establish the consultant as an authoritative, empathetic leader.

sizes.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl tracking-tighter leading-[0.9]
sizes.caption: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em]

grid.hero: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-16 items-center

buttons.primary: bg-[#1C1B1A] text-[#FAF9F6] px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#3B3836] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1C1B1A] text-[#1C1B1A] px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#1C1B1A] hover:text-[#FAF9F6] transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#1C1B1A] px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:opacity-70 transition-opacity

cards.service: bg-[#F2EFE9] p-8 md:p-12 border-none transition-transform duration-500 hover:-translate-y-2

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/80 border-b border-black/5 py-4
navigation.links: text-sm font-medium tracking-wide text-[#1C1B1A] hover:opacity-60 transition-opacity

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-[#1C1B1A]/20 py-3 px-0 rounded-none focus:outline-none focus:border-[#1C1B1A] focus:ring-0 transition-colors w-full placeholder:text-[#1C1B1A]/40 text-[#1C1B1A]

motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. It is mandatory for this editorial feel.
motion.reveal: Use framer-motion for subtle Y-axis translate (e.g., y: 20 -> 0) and opacity fade-ins on scroll. Keep durations long (0.8s) and easing smooth (cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)).
motion.hover: Image scales slightly inside hidden overflow containers (scale: 1.05).

images.description: Main portrait of Grzegorz Herbowicz to be used in the hero section. Align to the right side, overlapping the grid for an editorial look.
Minimalist light/shadow architecture wall. Use as a subtle background element or for the 'About' section image to break up text.
Elegant workspace/meeting table. Use as an ambient background in the authenticated booking portal or the contact section.

Landing.Hero: Split layout. Left: H1 with Leibniz quote ('We live in the best of possible worlds') in Cormorant Garamond, italicized. Below: Name, 'The Ethical and Empathetic Leader...', and CTA buttons. Right: The provided portrait. Large generous padding.
Landing.About: Asymmetric text layout. Large bold numbers or drop caps. Explain the 'Ethical AI Strategy' philosophy.
Landing.Services: 3-column grid mapping to: AI Strategy Consultant, Responsible AI Agents, Ethical AI Leadership. Flat elegant cards.
Landing.Contact: Minimalist form using the custom input styles (border-bottom only). Integrated with Resend.

Auth_Modal.Layout: A sleek, glassmorphic modal overlay. Email/Password inputs + 'Sign in with Google' button. Tabs for Login/Register.

Booking_Portal.Layout: Accessible only when authenticated. Clean Dashboard grid mode. Left col: User profile and upcoming meetings. Right col: Shadcn Calendar for selecting date, followed by time slot selection. Submits booking.
Booking_Portal.Style: Maintain the editorial aesthetic but transition to a slightly tighter layout suitable for interaction. Use 'Manrope' for the calendar numbers for perfect readability.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Google Fonts: 'Cormorant Garamond' (weights 300, 400, 400i) and 'Manrope' (weights 400, 500).
Implement the landing page primarily with pure HTML/Tailwind to maintain the editorial, cardless look. Do not overuse Shadcn's default borders/cards on the landing page.
For forms, calendar, and modal logic, use Shadcn UI components but severely strip down their styles to match the 'border-bottom-only' or 'flat' aesthetic defined in the guidelines.
Implement full JWT-based authentication and a Google SSO option. Ensure protected routing for the Booking portal.
Integrate the Contact Form with Resend to send emails to 'herbowicz@gmail.com'.
Add a language switcher (EN/PL) in the sticky navigation. It should toggle content using a simple i18n context or state.
Always apply `data-testid` to interactive elements (login buttons, form inputs, booking slots) for rigorous automated testing.
